Package mru.store.model

Class BoardGames

java.lang.Object
mru.store.model.Toy
mru.store.model.BoardGames
public class BoardGames extends Toy
This class represents the toy type board games and extends from the toy class.
Author:
kaydence eng, xavier yick

    • setMaxPlayerCount

      public void setMaxPlayerCount(int maxPlayerCount) throws CustomException
      This method sets the maximum amount of players for a board game and throws a custom exception if the max player count is less than the minimum.
      Parameters:
      maxPlayerCount -
      Throws:
      CustomException
